name: stumason-skills
description: Stu Mason's agent skills: stop-patching (walls are design feedback, refuse the workaround), ticket-readiness (vague tickets go back), verify-bug-reports (check the report before fixing), brag-nudge (ship, then say so), prose-revision (cut the waffle), answer-first (stop burying the answer), escalation-ladder (cheapest technique first, LLM last), commit-cdr (commit with a decision record and provenance trailers). One skill per scar.
